mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month PAYEMS growth signals broad payroll income expansion and rising expected revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the labor market is still expanding.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2023-05-01 was 156105.0 thousand
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5%, elevated short rates raise equity discount rates and reduce risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or mean triggered return exceeds the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL combined with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% signals sticky inflation under restrictive policy, delaying easing expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month change is positive and FEDFUNDS > 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2023-05-01 was 303.294 and FEDFUNDS was 5.06
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction coefficient is not negative for 60-day returns in walk-forward tests or triggered returns beat baseline by more than 1 percentage point.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in HOUST while FEDFUNDS remains high signals rate-resistant housing demand and stronger future cyclicals earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises more than 10% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS >= 4.0%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2023-04-01 was 1401.0 and FEDFUNDS vintage value was 5.06
failure_condition: Reject if triggered cases have a negative average 60-day S&P 500 return or if the interaction term has Rank IC below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in INDPRO signals weakening goods output and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after industrial momentum turns down.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations show positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 65% of cases or downside hit rate is not above the unconditional negative-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: RSAFS growth exceeding CPIAUCSL growth signals positive real retail demand, supporting revenue growth and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: 3-month RSAFS growth exceeds 3-month CPIAUCSL growth by more than 0.5 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2023-05-01 was 686573.0 and CPIAUCSL was 303.294
failure_condition: Reject if the real-demand spread fails to produce a positive Rank IC for 20-day returns in at least 70% of walk-forward validation folds.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage point over 3 months signals recession risk and weakening household income growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage point over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns and no increase in left-tail return frequency versus the unconditional sample.

mechanism_narrative: Higher two-quarter GDPC1 growth signals broad real demand expansion and stronger aggregate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher two-quarter GDPC1 growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 60-day S&P 500 returns or if top-quintile growth underperforms bottom-quintile growth.
